measurement_caveat: WebSearch proxy is DIRECTIONAL ONLY; it cannot observe true ChatGPT/Claude/Perplexity citations. Domain is 10 days post-rebrand (sayfeai.com); near-zero indexation expected. 0/N is not a regression signal.
sample_note: 7 WebSearch-proxy searches across 7 priority-bucket query_ids. Compliance 2, assessment 1, partner_channel 1, comparison 1, industry 1 (insurance — JSON-LD canonical sweep candidate, 3/16), trust 1. Same volume cadence as 2026-05-27.

results.notes: Winners (PurpleSec, Thoropass, AIHR, HiBob, Lattice, Certified NETS, Polygraf, Jasper) all rank with frictionless free downloads — no signup or email-gate on the template itself. iFeeltech bundles AI inside a 7-document SMB IT policy pack. The /compliance/ai-policy-template pillar (Engine 1 handoff) must include a one-click download to compete. No actionable patch on existing pages this run — pillar handoff confirmed.

Our /blog/ai-compliance-colorado-eu-small-business-2026 holds the SB 26-189/ADMT framing shipped 2026-05-22. Cited competitors range over EU Aug 2 2026 GPAI date, Colorado risk-based framework, FCC one-to-one consent (Jan 27 2026), TCPA penalties, NYC LL 144 bias audit. Path Opt still uses 'effective Feb 1 2026' for Colorado — stale relative to signed SB 26-189 (effective 2027-01-01), but we already corrected our own framing 2026-05-22 and would only churn by re-editing. No actionable patch this run.

TrustLayer (15+ risk factors, in seconds, no signup) + Logicballs + MyMap (5x5 likelihood-impact matrix in seconds) all own the '5-minute / no signup / risk matrix' framing. The /compliance-assessment pillar (Engine 1 conversion mechanism) is still 404 — Engine 1 build remains highest-leverage handoff for Claude Code. No actionable patch this run (can't add a callout to a 404 page; can't patch a non-existent destination).

Knowledge Group + Clio + myLawCLE + Quarles + JDSupra/IR Global all own this. New citation theme: 'I didn't know the associate was using ChatGPT' is not a defense — firms must have a firm-wide AI policy and training. Sayfeai has no CLE webinar offering — strategy proposal (Engine 2) only. /industries/legal already covers Heppner-Rakoff + AI policy themes (added 2026-05-20) so no defensive patch needed. No new competitor at 3+ threshold.

Our /blog/microsoft-copilot-meltdown-why-chatgpt-business-winning page is current ($25/$20 pricing, GPT-5.4 / 440M DAU / Mar 17 2026 restructure / Andreou-Suleyman handoff / OpenAI $840B all match cited consensus). Page has 5 FAQs + full comparison table + accurate pricing. No fact gap — would be churn to re-edit. Microsoft Graph 1.8s-vs-3.4s mechanism is the one not in our FAQs but adding it risks anti-Copilot churn — that's the editorial choice. Defer.

Citations cluster on agency-marketing/social use cases + data-privacy warnings (Hawksoft: 'free ChatGPT may use input to train; never enter PII'). NEW factual fact: Business Insurance reports 'Travelers unit launches business insurance app in ChatGPT' — first carrier-published Apps SDK experience. PATCHED this run: (a) added 2 visible FAQ items + matching FAQPage mainEntity entries (Travelers/in-ChatGPT app + PII data-privacy with NAIC Model Bulletin reference); FAQPage 3 -> 5. (b) added the previously missing VISIBLE FAQ section (mirrors healthcare 5/23 fix — JSON-LD-only -> visible+JSON-LD parity). (c) Article JSON-LD: added @id, url, mainEntityOfPage, datePublished, dateModified=2026-05-28, publisher.logo. (d) Service JSON-LD url 'https://sayfeai.com/industries/insurance' (vercel.json 301-redirects) -> canonical 'https://sayfeai.com/insurance' (3/16 of queued JSON-LD canonical sweep; healthcare 1/16 on 2026-05-23, finance 2/16 on 2026-05-27). Sitemap lastmod 2026-05-21 -> 2026-05-28.

Cited consensus today: standard ChatGPT (free/Plus/Business) is NOT HIPAA compliant; ChatGPT for Healthcare (Jan 2026, OpenAI Help Center) supports BAA + data residency + CMK + audit logs; OpenAI API supports BAA for eligible customers; ChatGPT Health (consumer health-literacy product) does NOT get a BAA. Our /blog/chatgpt-healthcare-hipaa-2026 page already carries this exact framing after the 2026-05-24 accuracy correction. No actionable patch — already aligned, would be churn.
